title: Jayabheri Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jayabheri Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
